ItacPersonItem.Notes: A sonnet by Nicolo Franco is addressed to Cane in the `Rime Maritime`, found in Gioan Iacopo Bottazzo`s Dialogi Maritimi (1547), where his academic nickname, Peloro, is indicated and connects him to the Accademia degli Argonauti in Casale Monferrato. A letter by Cane, `Al Signor`, is included in Stefano Guazzo`s Lettere Volgari di Diversi Gentilhuomini del Monferrato (1566). He also features in book 4 of Guazzo`s Civil Conversazione (1574).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
